messages.content: The image you provided appears to be a black rectangle with a thin white border on the right and bottom sides. There are no visible objects, text, or people in the image. The image is largely black, with a small white section on the right and bottom.
Analyse my screen and tell me what is the error in the given program

I'm looking at an image of a black screen, which suggests a potential program error, possibly a graphics driver issue or software conflict, similar to the errors described in the Valorant black screen error or OBS display capture black screen error.
What do you see on my screen? Describe it in detail.

The image on your screen appears to be a screenshot of a computer program interface with a predominantly black background. 
In the center of the screen, there is a large purple and blue swirl design. 

On the left side of the screen, there is a vertical menu with several sections, including "Activity", which displays a list of actions such as "Streaming response", "Extracting query", "Searching web", and "Search completed". 

On the right side of the screen, there is a live search section with a heading that says "Live search" and a search query that reads "program error analysis black screen". 

There are also several chat-like sections with text bubbles containing messages from "Jarvis" and "You". The messages discuss a potential program error, possibly related to a graphics driver issue or software conflict. 

At the top of the screen, there is a browser toolbar with several icons and a URL that reads "localhost:8000/app/". 

The bottom of the screen displays a taskbar with several icons, including the Windows logo, and a clock that reads "14:59 25-04-2026".
